residents.name: BIGALKE
residents.pressText: Amidst the interplay of darkness and light, he stands as the shadows cast their influence upon him. Pressure, melancholy, and rapture intertwine, fueling an ever-evolving stream of transformation. These elements manifest as sudden bursts of illumination, just like lightning, reflecting a reality born of a shared instant in time. The resulting flashes he creates, are fed by the profound connection between Techno, industrial destruction, groove, and broken structures.
